# Fancy Robot Creative — AI Visibility Intelligence

> We measure how AI recommends your brand, find the gaps, and fix them.

## What We Do

Fancy Robot measures AI visibility — how often and how favorably AI assistants (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and others) recommend a brand when users ask questions in its category.

We use a proprietary scoring system called the **ARI (AI Recommendation Index)**, scored 0-100, based on:
- **Mention Frequency** (40%) — How often AI mentions the brand
- **Position Quality** (25%) — Where the brand ranks in recommendation lists
- **Narrative Accuracy** (20%) — Whether AI describes the brand correctly
- **Founder Retrieval** (15%) — Whether AI knows the people behind the brand

## Services

### Free AI Visibility Snapshot
- Enter any domain at https://fancyrobot.com/snapshot
- 20 open-ended prompts across 4 personas and 4 topics
- Scored against a single AI model in ~30 seconds
- Includes competitor comparison, persona breakdown, and strategic recommendations

### Full AI Visibility Audit
- 60+ prompts across 8 dimensions (category default, use case, comparison, attribute-specific, gift/social, founder/brand, geographic, adjacent category)
- Tested across 4+ AI models (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Gemini, Perplexity)
- Anti-pattern detection (Kleenex Effect, Premium Tax, Founder Invisibility, etc.)
- Consultant-quality narrative report with named core problem and strategic recommendations
- PDF deliverable

### AI Visibility Growth
- Content strategy based on audit findings
- Distribution through 2,500+ publication network
- Structured data implementation
- Re-measurement to confirm improvement

## Industries
Financial services, healthcare, SaaS, professional services, e-commerce, nonprofits.
